name: Lever Incline Hammer Chest Press
shortDescription: A machine-based incline chest press emphasizing the upper chest and shoulders.
instructions: Adjust the seat so the handles are level with your upper chest when seated. Grip the handles firmly and press them up and slightly forward, focusing on squeezing your upper chest. Return to the starting position under control after a brief pause.
steps: Adjust seat height for optimal handle position.
Sit and grip handles with elbows bent.
Press handles up and forward above chest.
Lower handles slowly to starting position.
breathing: Exhale as you press up, inhale as you lower down.
